crossref.abstract: <jats:p>Reticular chemistry allows for the rational design and synthesis of stable metal–organic frameworks with targeted nets and programmable pores for diverse applications ranging from water capture and catalysis to gas storage and separation.</jats:p>
title: Rational design of stable functional metal–organic frameworks
